rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(207, 216, 220), rgb(46, 54, 57));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1373px; margin-left: 367px;

div.div:
Chen notation — rectangle = entity, diamond = relationship. Cardinality (max, min): "1, 1" exactly one · "1, 0" at most one (nullable FK) · "N, 0" zero or more · "N, 1" one or more.
AuditLog is standalone — UserID is a snapshot with no FK constraint (CR-11).

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
